representatives.name: Ms Ling Wai-kai Vickie
representatives.role: Instructed by DLA, for the accused

offence_date.source: the defendant on 30 November 2023, at Room 1140, Hong Tai House, Cheung Hong Estate, Tsing Yi, New Territories, unlawfully trafficked in dangerous drugs

offence_time.source: The police ... gained entry after 6 pm on the offence date.

place_of_offence.address: Room 1140, Hong Tai House, Cheung Hong Estate, Tsing Yi, New Territories
place_of_offence.source: the defendant on 30 November 2023, at Room 1140, Hong Tai House, Cheung Hong Estate, Tsing Yi, New Territories, unlawfully trafficked in dangerous drugs

cross_border.source: No cross-border activity is mentioned in the judgment.

trafficking_mode.source: He admitted packing and delivering drugs on instructions for monetary rewards.

roles_facts.source: I am satisfied that the role of the defendant is one of storekeeper and courier.
I am satisfied that the role of the defendant is one of storekeeper and courier.

reasons_for_offence.source: He could store some goods and make some deliveries for $16,000 a month.
the COVID pandemic affected his employment and he was made redundant. ... at the time of his arrest, he was unemployed.
He was tempted by an old school friend who promised an easy job for quick and good money.

He was told if he quit the job, he would need to repay $30,000 as compensation. Since he did not have the money, he kept the drugs and followed instructions to repack drugs into smaller packets and make deliveries.

benefits_received.source: He could store some goods and make some deliveries for $16,000 a month.
